title: ranunculus pinnatus subsp. madagascariensis
intro: Ranunculus pinnatus subsp. madagascariensis, also known as the lesser spearwort or Madagascar lesser spearwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the ranunculus family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ranunculus pinnatus subsp. madagascariensis include its ability to help reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its leaves and stems in water or oil, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications and uses.
